The Proposal: -

A plan needs to be worked out. Accordingly, the General Administration Department Reference No. 2 here.
Administrative divisions to prepare capacity building plan for each administrative division under the letter.
Instructions have been given to set up capacity building units (CBUs) at the level.
Accordingly, the Administrative Division will prepare a capacity building plan for the School Education Department.
The issue of setting up of capacity building units at the level was under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
A Capacity Building Plan (CBP) has been prepared at the school education department level.
Capacity Building Unit (CBU) at the administrative division level is constituted as follows:
It is being approved to: -
Government Decision No: Narrow 2026 / Q. No.27 / Training,
Function of Capacity Building Unit (CBU): -
I. Analyzing the training-related needs and competencies of the personnel in the department.
To act as the nodal body for implementing the construction plan.
II. Taking into account the duties and responsibilities of various cadre posts in the Department.
Capacity building plan based on skills required for them
The goals for the current financial year and the future while preparing this plan.
Consider your needs. It is also available on the IGOT-Karmayogi platform.
Using existing AI-based tools.
III. Online training and not relying solely on traditional training by the departments.
A combination of in-person and on-the-job training
to adopt.
IV. Creation of Capacity Building Framework of the Department as per the targets set by the State.
and implementation, periodical review.
V. Registration of all officers / employees of the department on the portal 'IGOT Karmayogi'
(onboarding) and supervising training, as well as online courses in a timely manner.
Completion and participation of staff in offline workshops / trainings.
